game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Cafe Master Story:** Players manage a coffee shop by strategically placing furniture and decor, such as tables, counter seats, and magazine racks, on a grid-based layout to enhance the cafe's "atmosphere" and attract diverse customer types. The primary gameplay loop involves researching and creating new drink and food recipes by combining up to three ingredients from a selection of bases like coffee or tea, then adding them to the menu for sale. Customers enter the cafe, order from available menu items, and generate income and "popularity points," with satisfied customers potentially becoming regulars and unlocking higher-tier customer demographics. Progression is achieved by accumulating revenue to purchase advanced equipment, expand the cafe's physical footprint, and unlock new ingredients, while also participating in "Combo Meal" contests where players select specific food and drink pairings to win "Grand Prizes" and further boost popularity. The game allows players to relocate their cafe to new towns after reaching specific popularity thresholds (e.g., 5000 points), each offering unique challenges and customer preferences, aiming to achieve a "Five-Star Cafe" rating.
game_info.description: Manage your dream coffee shop in Cafe Master Story! Place furniture to boost atmosphere, research recipes by combining ingredients, and serve customers to earn revenue and popularity. Satisfy customers to unlock regulars and higher-tier demographics. Expand your cafe, participate in Combo Meal contests, and aim for a Five-Star rating. Reach popularity milestones to relocate to new towns with unique challenges!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menus and select items
Space: Confirm selection / Place item / Serve customer
Shift: Open/Close menu system
Z: Cancel / Go back
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (from game over screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic functionality test. Tests navigation through menus, recipe creation, furniture placement, and basic customer serving. Validates that core game mechanics work correctly and state updates properly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Navigate through research menu, create simple recipes, place furniture items, and serve incoming customers. Test basic interactions and verify game state updates for score, popularity, and inventory.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Successfully create recipes, place furniture, serve customers, and accumulate points. No crashes or errors. Game state updates correctly with each action. Test passes if game runs smoothly for 1000 frames.

TEST_1.expected: Successfully create recipes, place furniture, serve customers, and accumulate points. No crashes or errors. Game state updates correctly with each action. Test passes if game runs smoothly for 1000 frames.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition test. Implements optimal strategy to reach Five-Star rating by maximizing popularity through strategic furniture placement, efficient recipe creation, and optimal customer service.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Prioritize high-atmosphere furniture placement, create diverse recipes to satisfy all customer types, serve customers efficiently, and participate in combo meal contests. Focus on accumulating 5000 popularity points to achieve Five-Star status.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Achieve 5000+ popularity points and reach Five-Star Cafe rating, triggering GAME_OVER_WIN state. Strategy should demonstrate effective resource management and optimal gameplay patterns to win within reasonable time.

TEST_3.test_description: Recipe variety test. Tests the recipe creation system by combining different ingredients to create diverse menu items. Validates that all ingredient combinations work and recipes are properly stored.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Systematically create recipes using different combinations of base ingredients (coffee, tea) with various additions. Test edge cases like using same ingredient multiple times or creating duplicate recipes.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: All ingredient combinations produce valid recipes, menu updates correctly, and duplicate recipes are handled properly. No crashes when creating many different recipes. System handles full menu gracefully.

TEST_3.expected: All ingredient combinations produce valid recipes, menu updates correctly, and duplicate recipes are handled properly. No crashes when creating many different recipes. System handles full menu gracefully.
